utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Welcome in, glad you stopped by! I'm John, I'm hosting today for the seller. What's your name?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Hi, I'm Sarah. My husband Tom couldn't make it today, but I wanted to come check it out.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Nice to meet you Sarah. Have you been looking long?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: About six months actually. We've been all over the West Side. We sold our place in Queens last year and we've been renting until we find the right thing.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Got it. What drew you to this one?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: The kitchen looks amazing in the photos. And we need at least three bedrooms, we have two kids.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Yeah the kitchen is the centerpiece, fully renovated last year. Three beds, two and a half baths. What's your timeframe like?

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Honestly we're ready now. Pre-approved up to one point four. We'd close in 60 days if it's the right house.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Perfect. Take your time looking around. I'll be here if you have any questions.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Hey, welcome! I'm John.

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: Mike, nice to meet you.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Hey Mike, you live in the neighborhood?

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: Yeah, two blocks over on Riverside. Actually, I was curious what's going on with this market. We've been in our place fifteen years. Kids are off to college. Thinking about downsizing maybe in the next six months.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Interesting. Have you talked to anyone about what your place might list for?

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: Not seriously. I figured I'd start by seeing what's selling. This one's asking one point three, right?

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Yeah, one point two nine five. We've had multiple showings already. Listen, if you're thinking about it, I'd love to do a free comp analysis on your place. No pressure.

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: Yeah that would actually be helpful. Can you email me?

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Absolutely. What's the best address for you?

utterances.speaker: C
utterances.text: Mike at example dot com.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Hi there! John, nice to meet you.

utterances.speaker: D
utterances.text: Hi, I'm Jennifer.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: What brings you in today Jennifer?

utterances.speaker: D
utterances.text: Honestly just curious. I drive by this building all the time and wanted to see inside. My lease isn't up until next year and I'm not really sure yet if I want to buy or keep renting.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Sure, no pressure. Are you familiar with the neighborhood?

utterances.speaker: D
utterances.text: Yeah I'm a couple blocks down. I love the area, just trying to figure out what I want long term.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Makes sense. If you want I can keep you on a low-key list for similar properties when they come up.

utterances.speaker: D
utterances.text: Yeah that would be great, no pressure though.
